creator: boris.hollas@gmx.de
text:
I installed FreeBSD 7 on a new hard drive and I also installed mplayer. As  
before, mplayer doesn't play CSS encoded DVDs (shows only scrambled  
images).

I observed the following during configure:

Checking for DVD support (libdvdnav) ... no
Checking for DVD support (libmpdvdkit2) ... yes
Checking for DVD support (libdvdread) ... no (disabled by libmpdvdkit2)
